name: Deere & Company
description: Deere & Company, doing business as John Deere, is a global leader in the manufacturing and distribution of agricultural, construction, and forestry machinery. Founded in 1837, the company provides a comprehensive range of equipment, including tractors, harvesters, and earthmoving machines, alongside advanced technology solutions for precision agriculture. Deere also offers financial services and manufactures engines and drivetrains used in heavy equipment. With a commitment to innovation and sustainability, the company serves customers worldwide, helping to meet the increasing global demand for food, fuel, and infrastructure through its iconic green and yellow machinery.
